raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "affirmation and self-authorization for boundary enforcement and disengagement",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "energetic boundaries are real and objectively detectable by the speaker",
    "incoherence is a valid, sufficient reason to withdraw without further inquiry",
    "guilt is optional and can be overridden by internal choice",
    "a bare 'no' carries complete communicative legitimacy regardless of context or relationship"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent within a subjective, intuition-prioritizing framework; no logical contradictions among the clauses",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker is in a situation involving repeated boundary violation or emotional depletion and the statements reinforce proportionate self-protection without foreclosing necessary communication",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "speaker uses the statements to rationalize avoidance of accountability, conflict resolution, or relational repair when those would be appropriate and feasible"
}
